resolve_to_kelompok: CSBNCA FM - SPRAY COL - WHITE SR
CSBNCA HM - SPRAY COLG - BLACK SR
CASABLANCA_SPRAY_COLOGNE_SERIES.note: Casablanca Spray Cologne Series di surat = White SR (White/Red) + Black SR (Black/Blue) SEKALIGUS. GLASS/GLAS series TIDAK termasuk program. Dikonfirmasi manusia 2026-07-11.

REGAZZA_EDT_SPORT.note: Regazza EDT Sport = 4 varian Azzuro/Bianco/Nero/Rosso, dibedakan dari EDT biasa via kata 'Sport' di Nama Barang Principle master (SAMA kelompok 'REGAZZA FM - EDT', BUKAN kelompok terpisah). Dikonfirmasi manusia 2026-07-11. match_pattern WAJIB brand-scoped (lookahead reg+a?z+a: REGAZZA/REGGAZZA/REGZZA) -- tanpa itu substring 'EDT' membajak baris brand lain (mis. 'BLAGIO HM - EDT' -> Bellagio EDT/EDP Prestige hilang, terbukti 2026-07-15).

REGAZZA_EDT_REGULAR.note: Regazza EDT biasa (BUKAN Sport) = 6 varian Classy/Feminine/Glow/Passionate/Purity/Sophisticated. Rule ini HARUS dicek SETELAH REGAZZA_EDT_SPORT gagal match. match_pattern brand-scoped (lookahead reg+a?z+a) -- WAJIB agar substring 'EDT' tak membajak baris brand lain.
